svg.title: Moonbox main workbench screenshot
svg.desc: A generated terminal screenshot of Moonbox showing the session inventory, timeline, session details, action path, and Vim-style key hints.
svg.text: Conclusion: raw session copy is the wrong abstraction.
Conversation summary created; hidden state cannot be ported
Target CLI resume returned 502 after provider/session
+ Canonical Timeline schema, + Work Capsule schema.
Before raw resume. Compile new Work Capsule for Hermes.
